name: mnemos
description: An AI agent that takes multi-step actions on top of your professional memory.

scripts.setup:agent: python3 -m venv apps/agent-py/.venv && apps/agent-py/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r apps/agent-py/requirements.txt
scripts.setup:web: python3 -m venv apps/web-py/.venv && apps/web-py/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r apps/web-py/requirements.txt
